name: tickets
description: Reaction based assignable support tickets with custom cases (reasons). Built by Saurichable&Dav as ReactTickets, then forked by Zan#6176 to add NSFW support + update to v3.5.3.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs for the duration of their support ticket being open.
